Off Calendar Jan-26-2011 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Status Report (Tv)
Off Calendar Dec-15-2010 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Status Report (Tv)
Off Calendar Nov-17-2010 Continued To Dec-15-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joel Blackman specially appeared for Steven Weinkauf for the San Francisco Public Administrator.

Mr. Blackman stated that Mr. Weinkauf just received the schedules and that he would file the accounting. The matter was continued to December 15, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Aguirre.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-22-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for the San Francisco Public Administrator.

There being no oppostions/objections, the Court granted the petition, (subject to a written order). Mr. Weinkauf will submit the order.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy B. Mann.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-23-2008 Continued To Oct-21-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Hugo E. Poschin (Brother) in Propria Persona. Daisy Poschin (Sister) in Propria Persona. Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator.

This was a pre-granted matter. The Court continued the matter to October 21, 2008 to allow Hugo Poschin and Daisy Poschin to seek Counsel. The Special Letters were extended until further order of the court.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Nici Rodich, CSR#11604. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.
